query:
SELECT id, sku, description FROM products WHERE sku = '59188';
SELECT pwi.id, pwi.productId, pwi.productSku, pwi.locationCode, pwi.batch FROM pickingWaveItems pwi WHERE pwi.productSku = '59188' AND pwi.waveId = 300001;
